text:
Memory Improvement Prompt:

Modify my OpenClaw setup so that retaining context is the top priority.
Change compaction.memoryFlush.enabled to true so that all data gets safely stored
before any compaction happens. Turn on memorySearch.experimental.sessionMemory
and make sure the sources are set up to pull from both memory and sessions.
Put these changes into effect right now.

Continuous Learning Loop Prompt:

Set yourself up as an assistant that continuously gets better by learning only from my direct feedback and the exact preferences I give you. Build a local memory system with three levels. Create a Hot file for permanent global rules, a Context file for specific project details, and an Archive folder for old patterns we no longer use. Every time I correct you make sure to immediately log the exact time and context of that correction. If you notice me making the exact same correction three times in a row ask me if we should upgrade it into a permanent rule. Set up a weekly maintenance routine to clear out any duplicate information, move outdated items to the archive, and send me a quick summary of what was changed. Whenever you actually apply one of these rules tell me exactly which file and line number it came from. Never under any circumstances store sensitive personal data or login credentials. If I tell you to forget a specific detail or wipe the entire system delete it right away and confirm when it is done.
